payload.author: codex
payload.body: Added mobile visibility for the task-sync state: iOS now decodes /api/meta into HubMeta, fetches it on connect/network return, fixes HubClient.checkConnectivity to decode the real meta shape, and shows Settings > Hub > Remote Task Sync as Not configured / Linked / offline / Syncing. This makes the current failure visible in-app. Remaining operational step: bind this workspace to the real hosted hub with URL + project + API key so startRemoteSync can actually push local task events.
